tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
tool_args.raw_text: Metropolitan Transportation Authority - MTA

payload.description: A public benefit corporation and a component unit of the State of New York whose mission is to continue, develop, and improve public transportation in the New York metropolitan area.

tool_args.label: Central Business District Tolling Program Pause
tool_args.raw_text: On June 5, 2024, Governor Hochul announced her intention to pause the implementation of CBDTP. Subsequently, on June 26, 2024, the MTA Board adopted a resolution recognizing the pause, extending the implementation of CBDTP until a tolling agreement among the project sponsors – B&T, the New York State Department of Transportation, and the New York City Department of Transportation – has been executed, and authorizing the president of TBTA to implement the CBDTP after the tolling agreement has been executed.

payload.claim_text: On June 5, 2024, Governor Hochul announced her intention to pause the implementation of CBDTP. Subsequently, on June 26, 2024, the MTA Board adopted a resolution recognizing the pause, extending the implementation of CBDTP until a tolling agreement among the project sponsors has been executed.
payload.subject: Central Business District Tolling Program

tool_args.label: Open Audit Recommendations Status
tool_args.raw_text: Since the last report to the Committee, there have been 115 new audit recommendations created and 126 have been closed. There are also an additional 83 remediation plans that have been implemented and awaiting concurrence on their closure. This would result in over 200 remediation plans in total that are either closed or pending closure. As of today, there are 23 high-priority remediation plans that are currently past due.

payload.claim_text: Since the last report to the Committee, there have been 115 new audit recommendations created and 126 have been closed. There are also an additional 83 remediation plans that have been implemented and awaiting concurrence on their closure. As of today, there are 23 high-priority remediation plans that are currently past due.
payload.subject: Audit Recommendations

tool_args.label: Deloitte Energy Consulting Services for MTA
tool_args.raw_text: with respect to independence, in addition to the attest services performed for the MTA, Deloitte also provides the MTA with energy consulting services. This consists of fuel supply management support, electricity supply management support, and clean fuel electric vehicle and new technology support. The contract for these services covers the period from March 2022 to May 2025.

payload.claim_text: Deloitte provides the MTA with energy consulting services consisting of fuel supply management support, electricity supply management support, and clean fuel electric vehicle and new technology support. The contract covers March 2022 to May 2025. This work was deemed permissible and non-independence impairing under AICPA and Governmental Accountability Office rule sets.
payload.subject: Deloitte
